note:
{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment evaluates particle emissions from a 3D printing pen using various materials (PLA and ABS) at different temperatures (200°C and 210°C). The goal is to assess the impact of temperature on particle emission and to quantify metal content in the particles.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A scientist sets up the experiment by connecting a condensation particle counter to a 3D printer.",
    "The printer is run at different temperatures, and the particle counter measures the emitted particles.",
    "Data is collected and analyzed, showing particle concentration over time.",
    "Microscopic images of the particles are taken for further analysis."
  ],
